forbidden.title: This account does not have admin access.
forbidden.description: You are signed in through the SSO portal, but this account role is not allowed to open the admin frontend.

mfa_required.enrollment_title: Enroll multi-factor authentication before opening admin.
mfa_required.enrollment_description: Admin accounts must have a verified second factor. Open the security portal, enroll MFA, then return to the admin frontend.
mfa_required.step_up_title: Your admin session needs fresh verification.
mfa_required.step_up_description: The admin session is active, but freshness or MFA assurance is not enough to bootstrap the panel. Verify again through the SSO portal.
